recentTweets.text: I had a great time meeting these kids at John Muir Language Academy’s PrimeTime Summer Enrichment Program! Free summer school programs like this are so important for strengthening kids’ academic and social-emotional skills while their parents are at work. https://t.co/JfC7aZ69VL

Last week, I helped pack backpacks with school supplies with Home Start, a local non-profit focused on helping kids grow up in safe and stable homes across San Diego County. Every kid deserves to have everything they need to thrive in school and beyond. https://t.co/xWwMZB0sAd

Proud to visit Stepping Stone, which specializes in LGBTQ+-affirming treatment for substance use disorder, mental health services, and transitional housing. When it was founded in 1976, most treatment programs turned away LGBTQ+ people or asked them to closet themselves. https://t.co/IzLKZTw5f7

More U.S. strikes on Iran mean prolonged high costs for Americans, and higher potential for retaliation against U.S. service members – my constituents – in the region.

President Trump needs to abandon the strongman tactics and negotiate to end this war now.

I’m hosting a Telephone Town Hall this Thursday, July 16th at 7pm PT.

As always, there’s a lot going on right now. I’ll be here to give you an update about my work in Congress and answer your questions. I hope you’ll join me:
https://t.co/qfz3dWnEEl
Oh so you do want service members to have access to gender affirming care? Great! I’ll add it to the NDAA 🫡

Republicans bankrolled ICE with billions of dollars, and now they’re killing people in our streets like it’s nothing.

We need immediate investigations – without any interference or threat of retaliation or deportation by the federal government. Justice for Lorenzo and Johan.

The Trump Administration is taking away immigrant kids’ access to lawyers and deporting them at a record pace. Child deportation needs to end NOW.
https://t.co/yfjUJDz3EO
It was great to meet with Arts Education Connection. Every kid (and everyone!) deserves access to the arts because it shapes how they learn, grow, and see the world. https://t.co/ulDAlvCoh7

I loved meeting with some of the students and leaders from First Gen Scholars–an amazing organization that’s breaking down financial barriers so first-gen students can go to college debt-free. Investing in the next generation starts with making higher education accessible to all. https://t.co/TlKa7LxS8y

Are you a veteran or Gold Star Family member looking for your next way to serve? My office is hiring a Green & Gold Congressional Aide to assist the military and veteran community in my San Diego office. More details and how to apply here:
https://t.co/8TskmN95eD
I enjoyed the tour at AtmoSense and learning about their work to build cutting-edge gas-sensing technology to keep our air, workplaces, and communities safer. https://t.co/jmpPJqQo4F

Federal funding makes breakthroughs possible. That’s why the Trump Admin’s reckless NIH and NSF grant cuts hit research institutions like Scripps Institute of Oceanography so hard. I met with fellows and grad students there to hear more about how these cuts have hurt their work. https://t.co/2YuKCxc2HR

Donald Trump is waging an expensive and reckless war and building a new White House ballroom (and now helipad!), meanwhile, half of Americans are struggling to afford gas and groceries.
https://t.co/L0P0boVAPL

It was great to tour AiCella & Invetech and see how they’re using AI to make lifesaving cell therapies faster, cheaper, and made in San Diego! This is what American biomanufacturing and responsible use of AI can look like. https://t.co/zImj609YUW
I’m so grateful for Element Q, a place built by and for the LGBTQ+ community, where people can get identity-affirming mental health care and heal, grow, and thrive. https://t.co/cOLemqn0id

Policies that prevent, minimize, and address civilian casualties don’t just reinforce our values, they also protect our troops’ safety. Secretary Hegseth’s gutting of CHMR is directly hurting our national security.
https://t.co/aHMbyOQziK

It’s hard for everyone to afford the skyrocketing cost of living right now – including our seniors. I had a great time joining some seniors for lunch at the Bayside Community Center to talk about how to bring down costs, stand up to the Trump Administration, and more. https://t.co/gYo38TgoBy

This is a really worrying sign that the Trump Administration may transfer all unaccompanied minors to Texas, where it’s easier and faster to deport them. We can’t let that happen – there should be NO child detention and NO child deportation.
https://t.co/wLOArtoUia

Mohammad’s death was preventable.

He never should have been in ICE custody: he wasn’t violent, had zero convictions, and served with U.S. troops in Afghanistan. ICE agents refused to take his inhaler – showing complete disregard for his life.
https://t.co/NtCjWZAGPj

ICE is way too trigger-happy. In Texas, they just killed Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a father of three who was on his way to work. ICE needs to end its street immigration arrests and arbitrary arrest quotas, which are too often ending in death.
https://t.co/D8At6sJf0W

This reporting is alarming. If it’s true, it shows a complete disregard by Secretary Hegseth for hundreds of children's lives in Iran – who have nothing to do with this war. We need the full results of the Pentagon’s investigation into this strike NOW. 
https://t.co/uaqrtfcmVE

There’s nothing to gain by continuing the war with Iran. More strikes will only prolong high costs for Americans, threaten our troops’ safety, and give Iran less incentive to adhere to a deal.

Trump needs to put Americans first and finally end this war.
https://t.co/VunruZw03h

More kids are facing hunger this summer because of the massive cuts to SNAP and food assistance from Trump’s Big Ugly Bill.

THIS is the cost of Republicans' tax cuts for billionaires. THIS is the trade-off they made. Shameful.
https://t.co/KsCjC8GtyY
RT @elizaorlins: AI is already deciding whether you get hired, get a loan, or get an apartment. And when it discriminates, there's almost n…

Arbitrary quotas and unfocused, untargeted mass immigration arrests aren’t making our communities safer. They’re not going after violent criminals; they’re going after our neighbors.
https://t.co/qyKnfS5SJP

Donald Trump never really cared about protecting Americans' health or regulating big corporations. The actions of his Administration – like approving new pesticides containing forever chemicals – prove it.

"Make America Healthy Again" was a con job.
https://t.co/iIKyNjOYa1

THIS is exactly why we need a stock trading ban for both the White House and Congress.
https://t.co/wpgegAACLl

📢Applications for Fall/Winter 2026 internships in our San Diego District Office are open until July 10, 2026 at 11:59pm PT!

If you (or someone you know) is interested, please visit my website for more info on how to apply before the deadline:
https://t.co/MjKBH6GwbO

Instead of focusing on the economy, Donald Trump is focused on his new Qatari jet, crypto schemes, and his ballroom – and it’s showing.
https://t.co/F3iNvkfPj7

Don’t forget: Trump’s Qatari jet cost the American people HUNDREDS of MILLIONS of dollars to retrofit for security, as far as we know. The Air Force hasn’t actually released the final price tag.

What a corrupt waste of our money.
https://t.co/3ym6ZhH56A

Climate change is here, whether Trump believes it or not. The extreme weather events – including heat waves across our country and around the world – will keep coming and more people will lose their lives and livelihoods.
https://t.co/q4fWLOPIw2

Today, on America’s 250th birthday, I’m thinking about all the work ahead to build a more perfect union. We have a long way to go, and we can’t give up hope or pass the mantle. It’s on all of us to help build a fairer, more just, and thriving country. https://t.co/FroSgiu5B6

It was so great to join kids, families, and neighbors in Lemon Grove to celebrate America’s 250th birthday. This weekend is a reminder of all the values our country was founded on — freedom, equality, justice, and self-governance — that we’re still working toward. https://t.co/PWaNBiudno

Far-right Republicans are so focused on passing Trump’s SAVE America Act – which would suppress the vote of millions of Americans in November – that they’ve shut down Congress.

Their priority isn’t making your life easier; it’s suppressing your vote.
https://t.co/OnsFk1T9Re

Of the at least $2 BILLION Trump has made since returning to office, $1.4 BILLION came from his corrupt crypto ventures.

He’s abusing his power to accept bribes in the form of purchases of his memecoin and digital currency. This is corruption.
https://t.co/AfwXzuwCqB

When Democrats had the House majority, our first bill was getting big money out of politics. 

Now, the Supreme Court just sided with Republicans to give billionaires and special interests even more say in our elections. 

Who’s really on your side?
https://t.co/ap2INNSUgG

There have been at least 20 deaths in ICE custody in 2026 alone – and we know ICE is trying to cover up people’s deaths linked to time in detention by changing their policies and failing to report. We need answers, accountability, and justice.
https://t.co/U6arkCRLtf

It was great to welcome our CA-51 Congressional Art Competition winner, Nicole Yang, to the Capitol and see her piece, titled “Inherited Fear,” hung up alongside art from students across the country! Congratulations, Nicole! https://t.co/P5AxHpmmOu

It’s simply un-American to close our doors to people fleeing violence and natural disasters. This Supreme Court decision to allow DHS to end temporary protected status and turn away and deport asylum seekers is a disaster.
https://t.co/aBrgTJv9di

I’m so honored to receive the Champion for Children award from First Focus on Children! We need universal, high-quality child care and early education so all children can grow up safe, nourished, and healthy. https://t.co/lkhEs0RdMo

When @RepMikeLevin and I conducted an unannounced oversight visit at Otay Mesa Detention Center last month, ICE blocked us from speaking to any people who are detained. But we won’t stop showing up to demand answers and accountability.
https://t.co/F4yTIBdpR7

Trump’s Pentagon wants $1.5 trillion for stupid wars and billionaires get tax breaks but more than HALF of Americans can’t afford medical expenses and health care… what are we doing?!

We need to fix our national priorities ASAP.
https://t.co/P9Qcb8i0H5

It’s a daily struggle for so many families to find and afford child care during the summer. 

We need universal child care so that families can get the care they need, not just during one season, but every day of the year.
https://t.co/QM5sa18OWa

Of course, JD Vance thinks Watergate was no big deal – that was child’s play compared to the levels of corruption and cover-ups with Trump and the Epstein Files!!
https://t.co/u0WVrc8Cqo

We weren’t being hysterical. We knew this would happen.

When Republicans passed the Big Ugly Bill and cut funding for health care, they literally signed away millions of Americans’ ability to afford health insurance. And now it’s happening.
https://t.co/YWG8l73j2T

I’ve heard these rumors of insufficient and disrupted medical care too. I will keep showing up to Otay Mesa’s immigration detention center (both announced and unannounced) to get to the bottom of this. 
https://t.co/7jbK59yPhh

The Pentagon’s own initial findings conclude that the U.S. bombed the Shajarah Tayyebeh Elementary School – so I’m glad the House Armed Services Committee already passed my provision to publish an unclassified version of the investigation so we don’t have a full-blown cover-up.

It’s hard for anyone to afford living in San Diego – but it’s even harder for our military families. I’ve helped to expand access to child care and housing, but there’s a lot more we can do to ensure that our military families can make ends meet.
https://t.co/FJTJCIAe1L

The Trump Administration just further gutted the Department of Education’s Office of Civil Rights, where Jewish students previously reported instances of antisemitism. Another instance of making Jewish students less safe on campus.
https://t.co/DPg2AWrkQ7

ICE isn’t targeting criminals – they’re increasingly going after immigrant kids. Now, they’re trying to scare their lawyers and raid their offices. These brazen acts of intimidation won’t work.
https://t.co/UN3QCWAq0I

Words aren't enough anymore – we need ACTION. The Trump Administration has leverage they refuse to use to prevent these atrocities. If they actually cared, they would support my Stand up for Sudan Act and cut off arms to the UAE, which is arming the RSF.
https://t.co/JNqYa5SvgY

4 years after the Supreme Court overturned the constitutional right to abortion, it's never been more clear: we must codify the right to abortion nationwide and fight back with a comprehensive strategy of our own. https://t.co/kJ4ZErQMen

Donald Trump is holding up bipartisan legislation to lower your housing costs because he wants to take your ability to vote away. He’s a tyrant – and Republicans shouldn’t let him get away with it. https://t.co/SJypC2mZB5

Instead of addressing YOUR high costs, Donald Trump is spending hundreds of millions of your taxpayer dollars on building his White House ballroom. How thoughtful.
https://t.co/TKItiXPCDe

Corruption in *plane* sight.
https://t.co/EyfHB14sC3

The U.S. has murdered at least 211 people off the coast of Venezuela allegedly to address the fentanyl crisis, but these murders have had zero impact on the fentanyl crisis. Why?

Because Venezuela plays virtually no role in making or trafficking fentanyl.
https://t.co/L5KVoZJfCX

I’m relieved that no one was hurt and there’s no active threat to the Islamic Center of San Diego. But we urgently have to address the anti-Muslim and anti-Islam hatred brewing in our community and across the U.S. Everyone, no matter their faith, should be able to live in peace.

RT @SanDiegoPD: 🚨 Traffic Advisory 🚨

SDPD and San Diego Fire-Rescue are responding to a brush fire near Santo Rd. and Friars Rd.

For publ…

We need to overturn Citizens United.
https://t.co/poWPmLA1qs

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

We need to overturn Citizens United.
https://t.co/poWPmLA1qs

It was great to join @SDChamber for their annual Congressional Luncheon to hear from local business leaders and share how I’m working to support and strengthen our local workforce and business community. https://t.co/F9xVu9ECfL

Right now, our focus should be on maintaining this agreement – not sabotaging it. We need to use this opportunity to build a broader path away from war and collective punishment, and toward a future that brings more security and stability to the region.

The details of this deal are still unclear, but I hope this means an end to the financial toll on American taxpayers who are paying more for gas, utilities, and groceries. I hope my constituents get to come home and that civilians in the region can rest a little easier.

I am relieved by the agreement to end the war in Iran, but we also need to remember how we got here. 

Donald Trump pulled the U.S. out of the Iran nuclear deal in 2018 and then started this unnecessary, costly, and deadly war of choice.

On the 14th anniversary of DACA, the program is under siege. USCIS is intentionally delaying the process and failing to process renewals so folks have lost their jobs while waiting in limbo. They deserve stability and pathways to citizenship.
https://t.co/sk68fs6S8e

The leader of Tren de Aragua was responsible for human and drug trafficking and horrific violence. He should have been held accountable in a court of law, not in a rogue display of bravado. Ignoring these rules makes them less effective at protecting us.
https://t.co/V795180dnN

The Trump Administration is continuing to sink to new lows – deporting people to countries where they have no ties, support, or protections. They just sent two dozen people to the Central African Republic, where they’re likely to face human rights abuses.
https://t.co/4dd1G0dwW7

It’s a full-scale cover up INSIDE THE SITUATION ROOM to conceal the Epstein Files.

Don’t give up. Keep the pressure on.
